reviews.review_msg: 477 is a 400 level class so expect lots of team work, but Shaka gives super personal and relevant feedback (true gem)! Sharka also comes from an Entrepreneurial background so she brings in a lot of very inspiring stories about her businesses. Others may say she is a little disorganize, but if you are willing to reach out, she is willing to help!

Very interesting class if you consider yourself 'entrepreneurial'. Spent a lot of time in group work which was a complete waste of time but unavoidable. Super easy class otherwise. The TA was awesome (shoutout to Dorothy!) Midterm was online and worth 10%, rest of the marks came from self reflection stuff. Easy to get A.
